versions.version_description: These chords were derived from previous other versions. These are not the exact chords from the song, but sounds great without the second guitar (like in the song). Have fun with it :).

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Complete and well-aligned chord sheet for the whole song / suggestions for playable voicings / F#m7-5 in the verses.

content:
Capo 4

[Intro]
[ch]Gadd9[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] 
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Look around your world pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Is it everything you hoped it'd  be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
  The wrong guy the wrong situation[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  The right time to roll to me[/tab]

[Break]
([ch]D[/ch])   [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  
roll to me                           [/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   
And look into your heart pretty baby, [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
is it aching with some nameless need[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Is there something wrong and you can't put your finger on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  Right then roll to  me[/tab]

[Break]
([ch]D[/ch])    [ch]D[/ch]  
         

[Bridge]
[tab]       [ch]D7[/ch]                [ch]Gm/D[/ch]       [ch]F#m/C#[/ch]       [ch]Em7/G[/ch]
And I don't think I have ever seen a soul so in despair[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
So if you want to talk the night through[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]A/G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]A/E[/ch]
Guess who will be there[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] 
So don't try to den-y   it pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
You've been down so long you can hardly see[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
When the engine's stalled and it won't stop raining[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's the   right time to roll to me[/tab]

[Break]
([ch]D[/ch])   [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

roll to me [/tab]

roll to me[/tab]

[Verse 1]

me the right time to roll to[/tab]
